confirmaciones.title: Confirmations
confirmaciones.subtitle: Please select one of the options.

confirmarEnvio.title: Confirm new orders
confirmarEnvio.subtitle: Here you can confirm incoming orders. Review each order's details and confirm its status to keep the system updated.
confirmarEnvio.searchPlaceholder: 🔎 Search by ID, route, or driver...
confirmarEnvio.confirmPrompt: Are you sure you want to confirm shipment with ID {{id}}?
confirmarEnvio.rejectPrompt: Are you sure you want to reject shipment with ID {{id}}?

confirmarIncidencias.title: Confirm reported incidents
confirmarIncidencias.subtitle: In this panel you can review incoming incidents and verify them against the corresponding data.
confirmarIncidencias.searchPlaceholder: 🔎 Search by ID, route, or driver...

confirmarEntregas.title: Confirm deliveries
confirmarEntregas.subtitle: Here you can review orders that need delivery verification.
confirmarEntregas.searchPlaceholder: 🔎 Search by ID, route, or driver...
confirmarEntregas.confirmPrompt: Are you sure you want to confirm delivery with ID {{id}}?
confirmarEntregas.rejectPrompt: Are you sure you want to reject delivery with ID {{id}}?

confirmarInicioViaje.title: Confirm trip start
confirmarInicioViaje.subtitle: In this panel you can review and confirm the start of trips for each order and validate the data.
confirmarInicioViaje.searchPlaceholder: 🔎 Search by ID, route, or driver...
confirmarInicioViaje.confirmPrompt: Are you sure you want to confirm the start of the trip?
confirmarInicioViaje.rejectPrompt: Are you sure you want to reject the start of the trip?

management.title: Supervisor Management
management.description: Manage supervisors registered in the system

messages.confirmDeactivate: Are you sure you want to deactivate user {{name}}?
messages.confirmEdit: Are you sure you want to edit user {{name}}?
